title: stelis caespitosa
intro: Stelis caespitosa is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the wild orchid. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis caespitosa include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, and it is also used to support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
